evidence.free_float: Free Float (%) 34.0 expected to further grow to IDR 2.2tn, up 96.0% YoY and accounting for 79% Shareholder Structure (%): of total topline, helped by 1.5mn homepasses and 500K homeconnects. PT Abadi Kreasi Unggul Nusantara 60.3 Rights Issue & bonds to partly fund other new growing business segments. Growth for INET will be partially driven by strategic expansions across Public 39.7 multiple segments: 1) subsea cable, 2) FTTH contracting, and 3) Node Internet Stock Performance services. These expansions should help improve EBITDA margins to 51.0% in 2026F and 53.6% in 2027F (25F: 34.3%) as a result of more favorable business (%) YTD 1M 3M 12M mix, paving the way for total net income to reach IDR 239bn in 2026F Absolute 382.8 (1.4) (11.4) 273.3 (+960.6% YoY) and IDR 714bn in 2027F (+198.5% YoY). To fund future JCI Return 15.3 0.5 7.2 7.4 expansions, INET plans to raise IDR 4.2tn through 2025-end rights issue and Relative 367.4 (1.9) (18.6) 266.0 bond issuances in 2026. Despite these debt-related initiatives, the company’s Stock Price & Volumes, 12M balance sheet is expected to remain solid throughout with net cash position. Spec-Buy with IDR 500 TP based on 2027F EV/EBITDA multiple of 9.1x. We assign Spec-BUY rating on INET with TP of IDR 500 (+85.2% upside), based on 2027F EV/EBITDA multiple of 9.1x (industry: 16.9x), implying 46% discount to its global peers, warranted due to its small-cap status. Assuming further market cap expansion to IDR 13.1tn (USD 795mn) or share price increase to IDR 1,400 (Big Caps: IDR 8,800), we believe the company could potentially be included in MSCI Small Cap Index, making the stock even more attractive to investors. We like INET as one of Indonesia’s fastest-growing ISP companies, supported by its ambitious expansion strategy and rising demand

evidence.directors: Board of Directors Position Experience Ownership Muhammad Arif (39) assumed the position of President Director in October 2022. His management background spans various roles, such as Commissioner at PT Pusat Fiber Indonesia (2022– President present) and President Commissioner of PT Sinergi Director 17+ 0.0001% Inti Andalan Prima (2019–2022). Previously, he was Vice President of Commercial and Operations at PT Technology Data Indonesia (2015–2019). Willy Unsulangi (38) joined the board as Director in November 2024. He concurrently holds the Commissioner post at PT Lugas Karya Estetik (2024– present), and has directorships at PT Elteco Director 14+ - Nusantara Teknologi (since 2022), PT Elteco Nusantara Sinergi (since 2020), and PT Garuda Prima Internetindo (since 2019). Sources: Company, SSI Research www.samuel.co.id Page 5 of 14 Sinergi Inti Andalan Prima Tbk Bloomberg: INET IJ Telecommunication Sector 11 November 2025 JCI Index 8,025 Financial Overview INET is expected to post strong topline growth, with revenue projected to reach Driven by aggressive expansion in IDR 942bn in 2026F (+706.9% YoY) and IDR 2.2tn in 2027F (+128.3% YoY). The subsea cables, fixed broadband (FBB), hike will be driven by strategic expansion across multiple segments, including 1) and node internet services,… subsea cables, 2) FBB business—B2C operations in Bali and Lombok (Bali Internet) and FTTH contractor, and 3) Node Internet services. INET aims to grow its B2C subscriber base to 2mn over the next five years, with significant ramp-up expected in the next two years, while WIFI’s customer base should further boost FBB revenue. The subsea cable segment is also set to benefit from robust demand, supported by Indonesia’s data center market, which is projected to grow at CAGR of +11.4% from 2023–2030F, and the broader digital economy, expected to expand to USD 210–360bn by 2030F. Figure 4. evidence.commissioners: Board of Commissioners Position Experience Ownership Saripudin (52). Appointed to the Board of PT INET in 2025. He has extensive experience in corporate management and business development, with a President strong background in strategic planning and Commissioner 11+ - organizational leadership. His broad perspective and commitment to good governance support INET in achieving sustainable growth and maintaining effective oversight. Cahyana Ahmadjayadi (70) took on the role of Independent Commissioner in October 2022. His prior board experience includes Independent Independent Commissioner at PT Telekomunikasi Indonesia Tbk Commisioner 44+ - (2017–2020) and Commissioner at PT Bank Mandiri Tbk (2010–2013). Earlier, he was Director General of Telematics Applications in the Ministry of Communication and Information Technology (2005). Tongam Lumban Tobing (60) serves as Commissioner at PT Giat Bangkit Indonesia and PT UMKM Pintar Indonesia, and Senior Advisor at PT Commisioner Jasa Utama Capital Sekuritas. Previously, he was 30+ Head of Financial Services Sector Investigation and Chairman of the Investment Alert Task Force at OJK, following over a decade at Bank Indonesia Years of (%) Board of Directors Position Experience Ownership Muhammad Arif (39) assumed the position of President Director in October 2022.
